features.name: Authentication & Registration
features.description: Writer and subscriber signup, email verification, JWT auth, password reset
features.notes: Foundation for all user-facing features. No depends_on — start here.

features.name: Publication Setup
features.description: Writer creates publication profile: name, description, cover image, custom slug
features.notes: Independent of auth at setup, but auth required to save. Can be parallelized.

features.name: Article Editor
features.description: Rich text editor for writing articles, image upload, draft saving, preview
features.notes: Core content creation flow. Blocks email-delivery and yandex-seo.

features.name: Email Delivery to Subscribers
features.description: Send published articles to subscriber list via Resend API, HTML email templates
features.notes: Requires article-editor to exist. Uses Resend + BullMQ queue.

features.name: Paid Subscriptions
features.description: Subscription tiers, payment processing (CloudPayments + SBP + YooKassa), access control
features.notes: Core monetization. HMAC webhook verification critical. 152-FZ: payment data stays in Russia.

features.name: Author Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Open rates, subscriber growth, revenue metrics, article performance
features.notes: Needs email delivery tracking to be meaningful.

features.name: Yandex SEO Optimization
features.description: Meta tags, structured data (JSON-LD), XML sitemap, Yandex.Webmaster verification
features.notes: Russian-specific SEO. Next.js Server Components make this straightforward.

features.name: Subscriber CSV Export
features.description: Writer exports their subscriber list as CSV for backup and migration
features.notes: Simple but important for writer trust. Must include 152-FZ consent audit trail.

features.name: Author Payout System
features.description: Writers withdraw earnings to Russian bank accounts, payout history, tax documents
features.notes: Requires paid-subscriptions to have revenue. Bank transfer integration required.

features.name: Recommendation Engine
features.description: Suggest publications to subscribers based on reading history and similar publications
features.notes: Growth feature. Simple collaborative filtering at MVP stage.

features.name: Referral Program
features.description: Writers share referral links, earn rewards when referred readers subscribe
features.notes: Growth loop. Depends on recommendation-engine for tracking context.

features.name: AI Writing Copilot
features.description: AI-assisted writing: headline suggestions, grammar, SEO tips, content ideas
features.notes: Uses MCP server + Claude API. 152-FZ: content processing — review data flow.

features.name: Micro-Tipping
features.description: Readers send one-time tips to writers per article (50–500 RUB range)
features.notes: Reuses payment integration from paid-subscriptions. Lower complexity.

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Platform admin: user management, fraud detection, payout control, content moderation
features.notes: Internal tool. Can be basic at MVP — key operations: block user, freeze payout.

MVP: Complete Writer-First CJM: register → write → publish → get paid
Russian payment providers integrated and tested
Yandex SEO live for all public pages
